Data structures, functions, and tests for chess management, with build instructions and version control files.

## Folders
- **[include](include/README.md)**: Data structures and functions for chess board management, game initialization, and move handling.
- **[src](src/README.md)**: Chess library for board management, game state, move operations, piece handling, and related tests.

## Files
- **[.gitignore](.gitignore.md)**: Specifies files and directories to ignore in version control for the spam-detection project.
- **[LICENSE](LICENSE.md)**: MIT License for the software, permitting use, distribution, and modification without warranty.
- **[Makefile](Makefile.md)**: Makefile for building a C-based chess library and tests with GCC, supporting debug and release modes.
- **[README.md](README.md.md)**: Instructions for building and testing a C-based chess library with example code and future plans.
